author: Youcef Mammar
subject: v6.0.0-beta.2
body:
# [6.0.0-beta.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.0.0-beta.1...v6.0.0-beta.2) (2019-10-25)

### Bug Fixes

* serialize cache value on hydrate ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2862](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2862)) ([62d8951](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/62d8951)), closes [#2828](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2828)
